name: Lead
POC
Item Creation at Opportunity Level
script:
# Replicate the Opportunity Value section into the standard items table.
if doc.custom_product:
    qty = doc.custom_expected_monthly_volume or 0
    rate = doc.custom_rate or 0

    existing_row = None
    for item in (doc.items or []):
        if item.item_code == doc.custom_product:
            existing_row = item
            break

    if existing_row:
        existing_row.uom = doc.custom_uom
        existing_row.qty = qty
        existing_row.rate = rate
        existing_row.base_rate = rate
        existing_row.amount = rate * qty
        existing_row.base_amount = rate * qty
    else:
        doc.append("items", {
            "item_code": doc.custom_product,
            "uom": doc.custom_uom,
            "qty": qty,
            "rate": rate,
            "base_rate": rate,
            "amount": rate * qty,
            "base_amount": rate * qty,
        })

    doc.run_method("set_missing_values")

# Recompute the items totals so they reflect the latest rows.
line_total = 0
line_base_total = 0
for it in (doc.items or []):
    line_total += (it.amount or 0)
    line_base_total += (it.base_amount or it.amount or 0)
doc.total = line_total
doc.base_total = line_base_total

name: Calculation
script:
doc.opportunity_amount = (doc.custom_rate or 0) * (doc.custom_expected_monthly_volume or 0)
doc.base_opportunity_amount = doc.opportunity_amount * (doc.conversion_rate or 1)

name: Opportunity Discount Writeback
script:
# Auto-manage a backing Discount document from the Opportunity Discount tab.
if doc.custom_discount_method:
    existing = frappe.db.get_value("Discount", {"party": doc.name}, "name")
    dstatus = frappe.db.get_value("Discount", existing, "docstatus") if existing else None

    if existing and dstatus and dstatus > 0:
        frappe.db.set_value("Discount", existing, {
            "discount_type": doc.custom_discount_method,
            "p_or_v": doc.custom_percentageper_litre,
            "percentage_value": doc.custom_percentage_value,
            "per_litre_value": doc.custom_per_litre_value,
            "threshold_value": doc.custom_max_discount_value,
            "date": doc.custom_discount_upto_date,
        })
    else:
        if existing:
            dc = frappe.get_doc("Discount", existing)
        else:
            dc = frappe.new_doc("Discount")
            dc.party = doc.name
        if doc.opportunity_from == "Customer":
            dc.customer = doc.party_name
        dc.product = doc.custom_product
        dc.company = doc.company
        dc.discount_type = doc.custom_discount_method
        dc.p_or_v = doc.custom_percentageper_litre
        dc.percentage_value = doc.custom_percentage_value
        dc.per_litre_value = doc.custom_per_litre_value
        dc.threshold_value = doc.custom_max_discount_value
        dc.date = doc.custom_discount_upto_date
        dc.set("slab_discount", [])
        for s in (doc.custom_slab_discount or []):
            dc.append("slab_discount", {
                "p_or_v": s.p_or_v,
                "qty_limit": s.qty_limit,
                "discount_value": s.discount_value,
                "threshold_value": s.threshold_value,
                "limit": s.limit,
            })
        dc.save(ignore_permissions=True)

name: Quotation Status to Opportunity
